'''Tyrix''' served as a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] at the garrison on [[Vryssa]]. He had thirty years of military experience, which possibly made him a veteran of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

He was killed by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] when his superior, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Gaege Xarran]] gave [[Rivo Xarran|his brother]], Rivo, asylum from the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] - who was after Rivo - in the base.

He was blindsided by a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt when Fett was presumed dead from a [[chemtrox]] gas attack.
